steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create an e-commerce category page for 'Urban Threads' with all the specified requirements. Let me build this step by step, verifying each component.

First, I'll create the HTML structure with inline CSS and JavaScript:

tool_calls.content_head:

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Urban Threads - Jackets</title>
    <style>

6. Cart badge functionality
